data.title: Frontier Management Inc. Reports Increased Sales but Faces Profitability Challenges
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Frontier Management, Inc. ( (JP:7038) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Frontier Management Inc. reported a significant increase in net sales by 30.1% for the nine months ending September 30, 2025, compared to the previous year. However, the company experienced a net loss, with operating and ordinary profits both in the negative, reflecting challenges in profitability despite increased sales. The company also announced the addition of four new companies to its consolidation scope, which may impact future financial outcomes.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7038) stock is a Hold with a Yen696.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Frontier Management, Inc. stock, see the JP:7038 Stock Forecast page.

More about Frontier Management, Inc.

Frontier Management Inc. operates in the management consulting industry, providing strategic and operational advisory services. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and focuses on enhancing corporate value through comprehensive management solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 35,498

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen8.2B

data.title: Perseus Proteomics Reports Q2 Financial Results Amid Ongoing Challenges
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Perseus Proteomics, Inc. ( (JP:4882) ) just unveiled an update.

Perseus Proteomics Inc. reported its financial results for the second quarter ending September 30, 2025, showing a slight increase in net sales compared to the previous year, but still operating at a loss. The company’s financial position has weakened, with a decrease in total assets and shareholders’ equity ratio, indicating ongoing financial challenges. Despite these setbacks, the company remains committed to its strategic goals, although it has not provided a financial forecast for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, citing difficulty in making rational predictions.

More about Perseus Proteomics, Inc.

Perseus Proteomics Inc. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, specializing in proteomics, which involves the large-scale study of proteins, particularly their structures and functions. The company is focused on developing innovative solutions in the biotechnology sector, leveraging its expertise in protein research to address various market needs.

data.title: Man Wah Holdings Reports Stable Profit Amid Revenue Dip
data.description:
Man Wah Holdings ( (MAWHF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Man Wah Holdings presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Man Wah Holdings Limited, a Bermuda-incorporated company, is a leading manufacturer and distributor of sofas, bedding, and ancillary products, operating primarily in the furniture industry with a strong presence in both domestic and international markets.

In its latest interim results for the six months ended 30 September 2025, Man Wah Holdings reported a slight decrease in revenue by 3.1% to HK$8.04 billion, while maintaining a stable profit growth with a net profit margin increase to 14.2%. The company attributes its performance to effective cost management and operational efficiency.

Key financial highlights include a gross profit margin increase to 40.4%, a modest 0.6% rise in profit attributable to equity owners to HK$1.15 billion, and a notable 18% growth in other income, driven by government subsidies and interest income. Despite a decline in the PRC market revenue by 6%, the company saw growth in its overseas markets, particularly in North America and Europe.

Looking ahead, Man Wah Holdings plans to continue its strategic focus on smart furniture and online sales expansion to enhance market penetration and operational efficiency. The company is also exploring potential acquisitions to strengthen its global market presence and sustain long-term growth.
